mapper.select:
select * from t.*, COALESCE(s.today_pv, 0) AS todayPv, COALESCE(s.today_uv, 0) AS todayUv, COALESCE(s.today_uip, 0) AS todayUip from t_link t left join t_link_statistics s on t.id = s.link_id and t.full_short_url = s.full_short_url and s.date = CURDATE() where t.gid=#{gid} and t.enable_status=0 and t.del_flag=0
order by t.total_pv desc
order by t.total_uv desc
order by t.total_uip desc
order by todayPv desc
order by todayUv desc
order by todayUip desc
order by create_time desc
